ORDER OVERRULING DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER

LAW AND MOTION 301, THERE BEING NO COMPLIANCE WITH THE TENTATIVE RULING RULE, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS GREG HELTON AND TIFFANY HELTON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED WITH 5 DAYS LEAVE TO ANSWER FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-01-2006 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
